name: 1'6"x2'6" Recycled Rubber Blocks Indoor/Outdoor Doormat - Room Essentials™: Skid-Resistant, Quick-Drying, Beige
description:
Elevate your outdoor decor in functional style with this Recycled Rubber Blocks Doormat from Room Essentials™. This colorful blocks doormat is made from a quick-drying, lightweight fabric to help keep your space clean and floors dry, while the skid-resistant rubber backing helps keep it in place. The fade-, UV-, and stain-resistant construction helps keep it looking its best for longer, and the low pile height makes it great for placement in high-traffic areas.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
